mapper.insert:
select seq_community_post.nextval from dual
insert into community_post (post_id, member_id, category, title, content, view_count, like_count, report_count, created_at, updated_at) values (#{post_id}, #{member_id}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, 0, sysdate, sysdate)
mapper.select: select cp.post_id, cp.member_id, cp.category, cp.title, cp.content, cp.like_count, cp.view_count, cp.created_at, m.nickname from community_post cp left join member m on cp.member_id = m.member_id where cp.post_id = #{id}
mapper.update: update community_post set title = #{title}, content = #{content} where post_id = #{post_id}
